Table of Contents

RocketEventsAPITokens.cs Documentation

This document provides a reference for the Razor tokens available in RocketEventsAPITokens.cs. These tokens are specific to the RocketEventsAPI module.

Token: AssignDataModel

Assigns and populates the data model for Razor templates. It calls the base AssignDataModel and then loads event-specific data, such as upcoming events, past events, and events for a specific month or day.

Signature

public new string AssignDataModel(SimplisityRazor sModel)

Parameters

Name Type Description
sModel SimplisityRazor The main Razor model containing all data objects.

Returns

An empty string. This method is used for its side effects.

Example

@AssignDataModel(Model)
JSON ```json { "type": "token", "name": "AssignDataModel", "source_file": "DNNRocketModules/RocketEventsAPI/Render/RocketEventsTokens.cs", "description": "Assigns and populates the data model for Razor templates. It calls the base `AssignDataModel` and then loads event-specific data, such as upcoming events, past events, and events for a specific month or day.", "signature": "public new string AssignDataModel(SimplisityRazor sModel)", "parameters": [ { "name": "sModel", "type": "SimplisityRazor", "description": "The main Razor model containing all data objects." } ], "returns": "An empty string. This method is used for its side effects.", "example": "@AssignDataModel(Model)" } ```

Token: RssEventUrl

Generates a URL for an RSS feed of events.

Signature

IEncodedString RssEventUrl(int portalId, string cmd, int monthDate, int yearDate)

Parameters

Name Type Description
portalId int The ID of the portal.
cmd string The command to execute for the RSS feed.
monthDate int The month for the event filter.
yearDate int The year for the event filter.

Returns

An IEncodedString containing the full URL for the RSS feed.

Example

<a href="@RssEventUrl(Model.portalData.PortalId, "geteventsrss", DateTime.Now.Month, DateTime.Now.Year)">RSS Feed</a>
JSON ```json { "type": "token", "name": "RssEventUrl", "source_file": "DNNRocketModules/RocketEventsAPI/Render/RocketEventsTokens.cs", "description": "Generates a URL for an RSS feed of events.", "signature": "IEncodedString RssEventUrl(int portalId, string cmd, int monthDate, int yearDate)", "parameters": [ { "name": "portalId", "type": "int", "description": "The ID of the portal." }, { "name": "cmd", "type": "string", "description": "The command to execute for the RSS feed." }, { "name": "monthDate", "type": "int", "description": "The month for the event filter." }, { "name": "yearDate", "type": "int", "description": "The year for the event filter." } ], "returns": "An `IEncodedString` containing the full URL for the RSS feed.", "example": "RSS Feed" } ```
